name: A Doki Doki Prom Night | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club
description:
Imagine prom night, with the girls from DDLC!

Guess what?! Chicken butt—!

So, it's that time! Releasing another DDLC Banger for y'all. Y'all eat this shit up like it's Thanksgiving. 😭 Here's what to expect! (And yes, I should clarify these ladies are all 18.)

  • Firstly, Fluff is prioritized here! No horror or depressing themes are here!

  • Secondly, it's Prom Night! And all these girls have spent the whole year subtlety fighting to get your attention, well, tonight. It's up to you. Make one yours? Or do the unthinkable— DATE 'EM ALL.

  • Finally, the girls may want your attention more then usual, causing drama. (Nothing serious! Just take care of 'em all, ok? Lock in. 🗣️)

That's it! I thought this would be a little unique and different! 😤🙏🏻 So lemme know if it's any good! And make sure to checkout my plethora of OTHER DDLC Bot experiences. (I have A LOT, all worth taking a look at!)

And well, I just wanted to say that I love you. Love my followers and my supporters. Thanks to y'all, I've had something to do when I'm bored. I love making Bots for you all. 🙏🏻 So, have a third meme.

AND! UPDATE! I made a Discord server. Feel free to join and to say hello. (I post teasers of stuff coming soon... 👀) Join: HERE!

Another Update! As of January 12th, this was changed from MalePOV to ANYPOV! Enjoy! 🙏🏻💙
creator: GhostOfOmi
